youtube_title: Cape Verde Held Spain to 0-0 in Their First-Ever World Cup Game
youtube_description: World Cup debutants Cape Verde shocked the tournament favourites, holding Spain to a goalless draw in Group H at the 2026 World Cup. Even Lamine Yamal off the bench couldn't break them down. Spain's title bid stumbles out of the gate. No-footage, original-graphic recap. Subscribe for daily World Cup stories. #worldcup2026 #spain #capeverde
instagram_caption: Spain. The favourites. 90 minutes. Zero goals. Cape Verde just held them on their FIRST ever World Cup appearance. Spain's wake-up call, or are Cape Verde the story of this group? Tell me who's winning Group H. Subscribe for daily World Cup stories.
tiktok_caption: Spain couldn't score on World Cup debutants Cape Verde. 0-0. Are they the story of the group? Who's winning Group H?
